---
title: reference
---

## core

- [`tag()`](tag.qmd): create an HTML element node.
- [`tags`](tags.qmd): HTML and SVG tag functions.
- [`tag_list()`](tag_list.qmd): create a sibling container.
- [`render()`](render.qmd): render an HTML node tree to a character string.
- [`raw_html()`](raw_html.qmd): mark a string as raw HTML.
- [`doctype()`](doctype.qmd): render the `<!DOCTYPE html>` declaration.
